TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_MarShon_Brooks, title = MarShon_Brooks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/MarShon_Brooks} }

S.FORM: MarShon Brooks hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 1, MarShon Brooks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

MarShon Brooks hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 1, MarShon Brooks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mars~ɕħon βrooks~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mars~ɕħon βrooks~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
